project_type: Java CDK project (AWS CDK with Java bindings) - event-driven sleep audio processing pipeline
build_system: Maven 3.9+ with CDK CLI (npx cdk). NODE_OPTIONS must be cleared for CDK commands.
test_framework: JUnit 5 with CDK assertions (Template.fromStack). 15 test files, 100+ assertions.
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'mvn test' - all tests must pass. 2. Run 'NODE_OPTIONS="" npx cdk synth' - must produce valid CloudFormation.
setup_instructions: Java 17, Maven 3.9+, Node.js 20+ required. Run 'mvn compile' to build.
environment_constraints: NODE_OPTIONS must be cleared for CDK/jsii commands. No Docker required for testing.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits (feat/fix/chore/docs/refactor). TDD-first. Update ARCHITECTURE.md Mermaid diagram if structure changes. All infrastructure needs corresponding tests.
key_patterns: Single CdkBaseStack with all resources. Step Functions orchestration with Choice-based validation. Dual SNS topics (success/failure). CDK context-driven multi-environment. Direct SDK integration (CallAwsService) for DynamoDB. Lambda encapsulates Polly integration.
directory_structure: src/main/java/com/myorg/ - CDK app and stack definitions (3 files). src/main/resources/lambda/audio-processor/ - Python Lambda. src/test/java/com/myorg/ - 15 test files + TestUtils.java. .github/ - CI workflow and agent guidelines. Root: README.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, SUMMARY.md, LICENSE, pom.xml, cdk.json, mise.toml.
